duas.title: Upon waking
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillahi alladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhi an-nushur.
duas.meaning: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after taking it from us, and to Him is the resurrection.

duas.title: Morning remembrance
duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdulillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah.
duas.meaning: We have entered the morning and the dominion belongs to Allah. Praise be to Allah. There is no deity except Allah, alone, without partner.

duas.title: Protection from harm (3x morning & evening)
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi alladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwa as-Sami'ul-'Alim.
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah with whose name nothing on earth or in the heaven can harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

duas.title: Evening remembrance
duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, walhamdulillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah.
duas.meaning: We have entered the evening and the dominion belongs to Allah. Praise be to Allah. There is no deity except Allah, alone, without partner.

duas.title: Evening protection (3x)
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahi at-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
duas.meaning: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

duas.title: Before eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah.
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: Forgot to say Bismillah
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi awwalahu wa akhirahu.
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah at its beginning and at its end.

duas.title: After eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillahi alladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah.
duas.meaning: All praise is for Allah who has fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power from myself.

duas.title: Before sleeping
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.
duas.meaning: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.title: Waking from sleep
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillahi alladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhi an-nushur.
duas.meaning: Praise be to Allah who gave us life after taking it from us, and to Him is the resurrection.

duas.title: When mounting a vehicle
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhana alladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen, wa inna ila rabbina lamunqalibun.
duas.meaning: Glory to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it by our own efforts. To our Lord we shall surely return.

duas.title: Leaving home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi, tawakkaltu 'ala Allah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
duas.meaning: In the name of Allah, I trust in Allah, and there is no power and no strength except by Allah.

duas.title: Sayyid al-Istighfar — the chief of forgiveness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bi ni'matika 'alayya wa abu'u bi dhanbi faghfir li fa innahu la yaghfiru-dhunuba illa anta.
duas.meaning: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant. I keep Your covenant and pledge as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favor upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me — for none can forgive sins except You.

duas.title: Brief istighfar
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilayh.
duas.meaning: I seek the forgiveness of Allah and I repent to Him.

duas.title: When facing difficulty
duas.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
duas.transliteration: Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal-wakeel.
duas.meaning: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.

duas.title: Dua of Yunus (when in deep difficulty)
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu mina-zalimeen.
duas.meaning: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

duas.title: When anxious or sad
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijal.
duas.meaning: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief, from weakness and laziness, from miserliness and cowardice, from the burden of debt and being overpowered by men.

duas.title: For beneficial knowledge
duas.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma.
duas.meaning: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

duas.title: For useful knowledge & honest livelihood
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an wa rizqan tayyiban wa 'amalan mutaqabbala.
duas.meaning: O Allah, I ask You for knowledge that is beneficial, sustenance that is pure, and deeds that are accepted.

duas.title: Before studying
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ عَلَيَّ حِكْمَتَكَ وَانْشُرْ عَلَيَّ رَحْمَتَكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah 'alayya hikmataka wansur 'alayya rahmatak.
duas.meaning: O Allah, open for me Your wisdom and spread Your mercy upon me.

duas.title: Help me remember You
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik.
duas.meaning: O Allah, help me to remember You, to thank You, and to worship You in the best of manners.

duas.title: Praise (tasbih)
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi, subhanallahil-'azeem.
duas.meaning: Glory be to Allah and praise Him; glory be to Allah the Magnificent.

duas.title: Refuge from Satan
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytani-rajeem.
duas.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah from Satan, the accursed.

duas.title: Affirmation of Islam (3x morning & evening)
duas.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَبِيًّا
duas.transliteration: Raditu billahi Rabban, wa bil-Islami deenan, wa bi-Muhammadin salla Allahu 'alayhi wa sallama nabiyya.
duas.meaning: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad (peace be upon him) as my Prophet.

duas.title: Best of this world and the next
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhab an-nar.
duas.meaning: Our Lord, give us in this world good and in the Hereafter good, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
